summary: Validated backend and mobile-first web preview for original Tonality renderer integration. All requested functional checks passed.
action_items: Optional: Add stable testID/data-testid hooks for iframe fallback and key adapter controls to strengthen long-term automation reliability.
Optional: Align env naming with platform guideline (EXPO_BACKEND_URL vs EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL) to avoid config drift across agents.
critical_code_review_comments: No API contract regressions found in tested endpoints.
Frontend fallback architecture (iframe on web, WebView on native) is correctly implemented for this requirement.
seed_data_creation: Created test render records via POST /api/renders during pytest regression.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Public preview URL and /api endpoints are healthy. Verified tonality renderer includes original HTML sections plus injected adapter controls; website and maze render actions function correctly.
rca_of_issue: N/A - no functional failures reproduced in this iteration.
